tui: Flutter/Dart · React · Angular · TypeScript · JavaScript · CSS/SASS

skills.name: Flutter / Dart
skills.usedFor: Cross-platform mobile apps with native performance - single codebase across iOS and Android without the usual trade-offs.

skills.name: React
skills.usedFor: Web UIs where speed of development matters and the output needs to stay maintainable.

skills.name: Angular
skills.usedFor: Enterprise-grade frontend applications where structure, scalability, and team conventions matter.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.usedFor: Type safety on the frontend and backend. Catches the class of bugs that waste the most time.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.usedFor: The foundation of the web stack - scripting, browser APIs, and integration glue across every frontend layer.

skills.name: WordPress
skills.usedFor: Content platforms that non-technical admins need to own and operate without ongoing developer involvement.

skills.name: CSS / SASS
skills.usedFor: Interfaces that feel intentional. Design is applied from the user's perspective - not added at the end.

skills.name: Firebase / Firestore
skills.usedFor: Real-time data sync, authentication, and scalable session-based data modeling for mobile and web apps.

skills.name: Node.js / Express
skills.usedFor: Backend services and proxy layers - especially where CORS handling, request routing, or third-party integrations need clean separation from the frontend.

skills.name: PHP
skills.usedFor: Custom WordPress integrations, plugin extensions, and server-side membership logic.

skills.name: .NET Core
skills.usedFor: Windows desktop tools and enterprise backend services - used at OrderEase to build database sync tooling for non-technical staff.

skills.name: REST API Design
skills.usedFor: Designing clean, predictable endpoints consumed by both internal tools and large B2B clients.

tui: Firestore · MySQL · MS SQL Server · MongoDB · GraphQL · SQLite

skills.name: MySQL
skills.usedFor: Relational data modeling for web platforms - schema design, query optimization, and production reliability.

skills.name: MS SQL Server
skills.usedFor: Enterprise database work at OrderEase - syncing local SQL databases with cloud APIs via custom GUI tooling.

skills.name: Cloud Firestore
skills.usedFor: NoSQL document modeling for real-time mobile and web apps - optimized for low-latency reads and live sync.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.usedFor: Document-oriented storage for flexible, schema-light backend services.

skills.name: GraphQL
skills.usedFor: Flexible query layer for APIs where clients need to shape their own data requirements.

skills.name: SQLite
skills.usedFor: Embedded local storage in mobile apps - offline-first data persistence in Flutter applications.

tui: Git · GitHub Actions · Docker · Linux · Backup & Recovery · CI/CD Pipelines

skills.name: Git
skills.usedFor: Version control backbone for every project - branching strategy, PR workflows, and release management.

skills.name: GitHub Actions
skills.usedFor: Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines - release workflows that are stable, repeatable, and require minimal manual intervention.

skills.name: Docker
skills.usedFor: Containerized service isolation and consistent environments across development and production.

skills.name: Linux
skills.usedFor: Server administration, shell scripting, and production environment management - the OS underneath every deployment.

skills.name: Production Infrastructure
skills.usedFor: Owning the systems that stay up after launch. Reliability is part of user experience, not separate from it.

skills.name: Backup & Recovery Systems
skills.usedFor: Automated website backups, system snapshots, and structured recovery pipelines to guarantee rollback capability.

skills.name: Firebase / GCP
skills.usedFor: Primary cloud platform for mobile and web - hosting, Firestore, auth, functions, and real-time infrastructure.

skills.name: AWS

skills.name: Azure
skills.usedFor: Microsoft cloud services used alongside .NET-based enterprise tooling and CI integrations.

skills.name: DigitalOcean
skills.usedFor: VPS hosting for production web deployments - simple, cost-effective, and fast to configure.

tui: C++ · Bluetooth Beacons · Native iOS/Android Integrations

skills.name: C++
skills.usedFor: Performance-sensitive native layers in Flutter apps - Bluetooth scanning, computation-heavy processing, and anything that can't afford the overhead of the Dart layer alone.

skills.name: Bluetooth Beacons
skills.usedFor: Proximity-based content triggering for location-aware mobile applications.

skills.name: Native iOS/Android
skills.usedFor: Bridging Dart and native iOS/Android APIs when the cross-platform layer isn't enough.

tui: UX Architecture · Content Architecture · Product Thinking

skills.name: UX Architecture
skills.usedFor: Every project starts with 'as a user, what would I expect right here?' - this isn't a phase, it's the foundation every technical decision is built on.

skills.name: Content Architecture
skills.usedFor: Designing information hierarchies that feel intuitive - so users always know what to do next without reading instructions.

skills.name: Product Thinking
skills.usedFor: Framing engineering decisions in terms of user outcomes and business impact, not just technical correctness.
